meta.title: Watch SpaceX launch a Falcon Heavy with the X-37B secret spaceplane! #USSF52
meta.description:
SpaceX will launch the X-37B space plane to a currently unknown orbit for the United States Space Force (USSF). This flight will mark the seventh overall launch and fourth for this vehicle (Vehicle 2), and will be launched atop SpaceX’s Falcon Heavy. Following launch, both side boosters will be recovered downrange and the center core will be expended.

For more info, check out our Prelaunch Preview! - https://everydayastronaut.com/ussf-52-falcon-heavy-2/

Tickets are on sale now to see some of your favorite space people LIVE in person, January 13/14 in Austin TX! We're giving out Astro Awards to missions & you can come! 
https://www.astroawards2024.com

00:00 - Intro
03:30 - Prelaunch Preview
13:15 - Q&A
29:05 - SpaceX Stream Starts
37:25 - Liftoff
40:00 - Booster Sep
45:35 - Booster Landings
47:00 - Q&A
01:02:00 - Brief History of SpaceX
01:08:05 - Q&A

--------------------------
